rationale: Two lenses ran (blind diff-only + edge-case with repo access); acceptance skipped (no-spec round, so confidence is low). All 7 raised findings are minor and were dropped in triage — 0 blocking. The edge-case lens confirmed correctness: `sessionMetadata.correlation?.agentSessionFile` safely yields undefined for absent/pending/failed correlation; uncorrelated sessions keep the identical pre-existing enricher fallback path; no double-counting (native-loader dedups completed_ logs via trackedLogPaths); cost-enricher.ts is the sole reader of the field. The blind lens's 'no correlation.status guard' note is a non-regression — the prior enricher fallback also read correlation?.agentSessionFile with no status check, and hook.ts only writes agentSessionFile alongside status:'matched'. 1 deferred (non-blocking) item: add a test for the partial-correlation boundary (correlation present but agentSessionFile missing / status !== matched).

standards_review.notes: Subject 'fix(analytics): populate agentSessionFile from correlation for completed_ sessions' is Conventional Commits, <=100 chars; commitlint passed.
ES module, explicit optional field on RawSessionData, no new any (sessionMetadata was already JSON.parse->any), surgical change matching existing plain-literal construction.
No security surface: forwards an already-parsed local path field; no new I/O, credentials, or user input.
